features.title: User Authentication
features.description: Implement JWT-based authentication with login, signup, and password reset flows. Include OAuth2 support for Google and GitHub.

features.title: Kanban Board UI
features.description: Create a drag-and-drop Kanban board with columns for Backlog, In Progress, Review, and Done. Cards should show title, assignee, and priority badge.

features.title: Real-time Notifications
features.description: WebSocket-based notification system for card movements, comments, and mentions. Include toast UI and notification center dropdown.

features.title: API Rate Limiting
features.description: Express middleware for API rate limiting with configurable windows and limits per endpoint. Include Redis-backed sliding window counter.
